evals.prompt: Import an ONNX NPC behavior model into Unity 6 and run inference every frame to control NPC movement.
evals.expected_output: C# MonoBehaviour with ModelLoader.Load(), Worker creation with GPUCompute backend, input tensor setup, worker.Schedule(), and output reading with PeekOutput().
assertions: ModelLoader.Load() is called with the ModelAsset
Worker is created with BackendType.GPUCompute or CPU
Tensor<float> is created with correct TensorShape

evals.prompt: My Unity Sentis NPC inference is taking too long (15ms per frame). How do I profile and optimize it?
evals.expected_output: Instructions to use Unity Profiler to check Sentis.Worker.Execute, recommendation to run inference every N frames, batching multiple agents, and platform-specific backend selection.
assertions: Unity Profiler is mentioned for performance measurement
inferenceInterval pattern (every N frames) is shown
BackendType selection for different platforms is explained

evals.prompt: How do I export my PyTorch NPC model to ONNX and load it in Unity Sentis?
evals.expected_output: PyTorch torch.onnx.export() call with opset_version=17, then Unity Package Manager import of com.unity.sentis, drag ONNX into Assets/, ModelLoader.Load().
assertions: torch.onnx.export or equivalent export step is shown
